TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Satudawa nu Sakizaya nayay ku mikikakaay tu nu wacu a masikaz tu pahabayay. šļļÁöĄŚŅ†ŚŅÉšłćŚ¶āÁčó nayay ku lecuhan henay sa matineng tuway tu nu tademawan. nicakayan mapuhed, makalamitay mala budawan ku ngangan. halipaaninay u mamacakat ku nikauzip, niaaman ku sakauzip u pulihic. mamataay a tatama tu tatayna, makilim ku mamucelay a tatayna. matinengay tu likec hakay caay kadamsay atu maliyuh paayaw. sitanengay a tademaw, u sitangahay a kakelidan. misawacuay tu tademaw, kabidangan nu tademademaw. śÉ°šļļŤÄÖšļļÁöÜśÉ°šĻč kau tingalaway a balucu' ku sapisuayaw tu tademaw. Ť™†ŚŅÉŚĺÖšļļ i baaten ku piazih sa, icelang ku balucu'. i baaten ku piazih sa, icelang ku balucu'. azaaway a limecedan. ŚĮāŚĮěŚįĎŚ•≥ i zazan nu kabelecan nayay ku micidekay. ťĽÉś≥ČŤ∑ĮšłäšļļšļļšłÄś®£ lihalay ku eneng nu pakuyuc, pasakucukucung ku balucu' nu kakitaan.
S.PHON: satudawa nu sakizaja najaj ku mikikakaaj tu nu wa ¶u a masikaz tu pańßabajaj. ******* najaj ku r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ńß…ônaj sa matin…ôŇč tuwaj tu nu tad…ômawan. ni ¶akajan mapuńß…ôd, makar~…ĺamitaj mar~…ĺa budawan ku ŇčaŇčan. ńßar~…ĺipaaninaj u mama ¶akat ku nikauzip, niaaman ku sakauzip u pur~…ĺińßi ¶. mamataaj a tatama tu tatajna, makir~…ĺim ku mamu ¶…ôr~…ĺaj a tatajna. matin…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺik…ô ¶ ńßakaj ¶aaj kadamsaj atu mar~…ĺijuńß paajaw. sitan…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw, u sitaŇčańßaj a kak…ôr~…ĺidan. misawa ¶uaj tu tad…ômaw, kabidaŇčan nu tad…ômad…ômaw. ******* kau tiŇčar~…ĺawaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ku sapisuajaw tu tad…ômaw. **** i baat…ôn ku piazińß sa, i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. i baat…ôn ku piazińß sa, i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. azaawaj a r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdan. **** i zazan nu kab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an najaj ku mi ¶id…ôkaj. ******** r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku …ôn…ôŇč nu pakuju ¶, pasaku ¶uku ¶uŇč ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu kakitaan.
S.FORM: Satudawa nu Sakizaya nayay ku mikikakaay tu nu wacu a masikaz tu pahabayay. šļļÁöĄŚŅ†ŚŅÉšłćŚ¶āÁčó nayay ku lecuhan henay sa matineng tuway tu nu tademawan. nicakayan mapuhed, makalamitay mala budawan ku ngangan. halipaaninay u mamacakat ku nikauzip, niaaman ku sakauzip u pulihic. mamataay a tatama tu tatayna, makilim ku mamucelay a tatayna. matinengay tu likec hakay caay kadamsay atu maliyuh paayaw. sitanengay a tademaw, u sitangahay a kakelidan. misawacuay tu tademaw, kabidangan nu tademademaw. śÉ°šļļŤÄÖšļļÁöÜśÉ°šĻč kau tingalaway a balucu' ku sapisuayaw tu tademaw. Ť™†ŚŅÉŚĺÖšļļ i baaten ku piazih sa, icelang ku balucu'. i baaten ku piazih sa, icelang ku balucu'. azaaway a limecedan. ŚĮāŚĮěŚįĎŚ•≥ i zazan nu kabelecan nayay ku micidekay. ťĽÉś≥ČŤ∑ĮšłäšļļšļļšłÄś®£ lihalay ku eneng nu pakuyuc, pasakucukucung ku balucu' nu kakitaan.
